summary: EXP-268 P2 patch (observed-vs-physical altitude pre-empt) added to §4.2.7a. Acknowledges dome's published h_Sun ≤ 4,200 km (physical / firmament limit) alongside 5,733 km observed, and shows that under the physical reading h_Moon ≈ 1,860 km, R_p drops to ~31 km (band ~62 km), which strengthens the kill rather than escaping it. Mirrors EXP-262's refraction pre-empt for the parent §4.2.7.
notes: Close after EXP-268 integrates into data/sections.json. The three text_patches in EXP-268 are additive footnotes; verified each {find} anchor is uniquely matched in current sections.json. Net section delta ~2,678 chars (~+170 words). All 13 <details> tags remain balanced after patch application. ‎
